title: Keepers of the Stones II: Reinforced Batteries
description: Keepers of the Stones II: Reinforced Batteries is an add-on mod that adds reinforced batteries to the game, similar to those available in the first version of the mod.
body:
# About
The return of the legendary Reinforced Batteries!

The “Keepers of the Stones II: Reinforced Batteries” mod adds to the game the ability to create and use more powerful reinforced batteries, familiar to players from the first part of the mod. 

Features:

- Reinforced Batteries: Create long-lasting and powerful sources of elemental power from Amplifier Drops.

- Amplifer Battery Charger: Use a special charger to recharge amplified battery packs.

- Increased Efficiency: Reinforced batteries will provide you with elemental power for a longer period of time (10 minutes).

- Compatible with Keepers of the Stones II: The add-on integrates perfectly with the main mod, expanding its functionality.
